## Checklist
- [ ] Inference stays local (no telemetry / off-machine data).
- [ ] Did not commit build output (`vendor/`, `engines/browser-engine.bundle.js`).
- [ ] Updated docs (`README.md` / `extension/README.md` / `docs/`) if behavior or architecture changed.
- [ ] Matches the surrounding code style.
